title: Stone Brick Recipes
description: Adds missing stone brick recipes for 1.7.10.
body:
A very simple mod created to add easy shapeless recipes for all three stone brick variants. Cracked stone bricks are made by smelting regular stone bricks, while mossy and chiseled can be crafted in the 2x2 grid. If you have an alternate recipe suggestion, please [open an issue on the project's GitHub repo](https://github.com/hi-skittles/Stonebrick-Recipes-1.7/issues), and I can most likely add a version using it instead. The mod is meant to be as lightweight as possible, which is why I will not bother with config files etc.!

![Shapeless crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3eddacc3a5186d9143781f00da8c8526a059165.png)
